query:
-- Create a test driver account
INSERT INTO drivers (
  email,
  name,
  license_number,
  company_id,
  is_approved,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  'driver@test.com',
  'Test Driver',
  'DL123456789',
  'comp1',
  true,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Verify the account was created
SELECT id, email, name, license_number, is_approved FROM drivers WHERE email = 'driver@test.com';
